title: Israel issues evacuation warning; kills 1, hurts 4 in Lebanon strikes
summary_full: Israeli airstrikes in southern Lebanon claimed at least one life and injured four rescuers on Sunday, despite a fragile truce. The Lebanese health ministry condemned the attacks, citing violations of the Geneva Convention. Israel issued new evacuation warnings for over ten villages, including those north of the Litani River, as tensions escalate following threats from Israel's military chief.
